'''鈭歽-z-t''' ('''kayazat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cache|cache]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-z-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cache|cache]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-z-t
|-
! Lemma
| kayazat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyazat|thiyazat]] || [[word:jiyazat|jiyazat]] || [[word:shiyazat|shiyazat]] || [[word:kiyazat|kiyazat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyazat|thuthuyazat]] || [[word:jujuyazat|jujuyazat]] || [[word:shushuyazat|shushuyazat]] || [[word:kukuyazat|kukuyazat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyazat|thuyazat]] || [[word:juyazat|juyazat]] || [[word:shuyazat|shuyazat]] || [[word:kuyazat|kuyazat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyazat|thuyazat]] || [[word:juyazat|juyazat]] || [[word:shuyazat|shuyazat]] || [[word:kuyazat|kuyazat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyazat|theyazat]] || [[word:jeyazat|jeyazat]] || [[word:sheyazat|sheyazat]] || [[word:keyazat|keyazat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyazat|thothoyazat]] || [[word:jojoyazat|jojoyazat]] || [[word:shoshoyazat|shoshoyazat]] || [[word:kokoyazat|kokoyazat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyazat|thoyazat]] || [[word:joyazat|joyazat]] || [[word:shoyazat|shoyazat]] || [[word:koyazat|koyazat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyazat|thoyazat]] || [[word:joyazat|joyazat]] || [[word:shoyazat|shoyazat]] || [[word:koyazat|koyazat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yazat|th忙yazat]] || [[word:j忙yazat|j忙yazat]] || [[word:sh忙yazat|sh忙yazat]] || [[word:k忙yazat|k忙yazat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayazat|thathayazat]] || [[word:jajayazat|jajayazat]] || [[word:shashayazat|shashayazat]] || [[word:kakayazat|kakayazat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayazat|thayazat]] || [[word:jayazat|jayazat]] || [[word:shayazat|shayazat]] || [[word:kayazat|kayazat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayazat|thayazat]] || [[word:jayazat|jayazat]] || [[word:shayazat|shayazat]] || [[word:kayazat|kayazat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayazat|shayazat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayazat|goshayazat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayazat|gokishayazat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayazatn眉|shayazatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayazatnkn眉|goshayazatnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayazatn眉|gokishayazatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayazatsh毛|shayazatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayazatnksh毛|goshayazatnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayazatsh毛|gokishayazatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayazatro|shayazatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayazatnkro|goshayazatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayazatro|gokishayazatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayazatmu|shayazatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayazatnkmu|goshayazatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayazatmu|gokishayazatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayazatsher|shayazatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayazatnksher|goshayazatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayazatsher|gokishayazatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayazatng|shayazatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayazatnkng|goshayazatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayazatng|gokishayazatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayazatya|shayazatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayazatnkya|goshayazatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayazatya|gokishayazatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayazatyam|shayazatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayazatnkyam|goshayazatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayazatyam|gokishayazatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayazatn眉sh毛|shayazatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayazatnkn眉sh毛|goshayazatnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayazatn眉sh毛|gokishayazatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayazatn眉ro|shayazatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayazatnkn眉ro|goshayazatnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayazatn眉ro|gokishayazatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayazatn眉mu|shayazatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayazatnkn眉mu|goshayazatnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayazatn眉mu|gokishayazatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayazatsh毛n眉|shayazatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayazatnksh毛n眉|goshayazatnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayazatsh毛n眉|gokishayazatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayazatsh毛ro|shayazatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayazatnksh毛ro|goshayazatnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayazatsh毛ro|gokishayazatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayazatsh毛mu|shayazatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayazatnksh毛mu|goshayazatnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayazatsh毛mu|gokishayazatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayazatron眉|shayazatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayazatnkron眉|goshayazatnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayazatron眉|gokishayazatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayazatrosh毛|shayazatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayazatnkrosh毛|goshayazatnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayazatrosh毛|gokishayazatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayazatromu|shayazatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayazatnkromu|goshayazatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayazatromu|gokishayazatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayazatmun眉|shayazatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayazatnkmun眉|goshayazatnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayazatmun眉|gokishayazatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayazatmush毛|shayazatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayazatnkmush毛|goshayazatnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayazatmush毛|gokishayazatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayazatmuro|shayazatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayazatnkmuro|goshayazatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayazatmuro|gokishayazatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
